positive: A highly intricate, symmetrical celestial mandala design centered on a stylized representation of crescent moons, constellations, and swirling galactic nebulae. The overall aesthetic should be geometric and mystical, rendered with deep indigo, sapphire blue, shimmering gold foil accents, and subtle touches of viridian green. Focus on clean, strong silhouettes and crystalline structures that allow for high contrast when printed on fabric. The composition must be perfectly balanced and contained within the square frame, suitable for direct apparel printing. Stylized vector illustration, intricate linework, sacred geometry, cosmic depth, fantasy art, 8k resolution, minimalist yet rich.
